# zstack_vrouter_route_entry (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage VRouter route entries in ZStack. A VRouter route entry defines a routing rule within a route table.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destination` (String) The destination CIDR of the route entry.
- `route_table_uuid` (String) The UUID of the route table.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the VRouter route entry.
- `distance` (Number) The distance (priority) of the route entry.
- `target` (String) The target of the route entry.
- `type` (String) The type of the route entry.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VRouter route entry.
